version

options.name: --overwrite
options.description:
If set to true the output file will be overwritten if it
exists

options.name: --publishers
options.description:
Comma separated list of publisher names to consider.
Wildcards (%) are allowed

options.name: --solutions
options.description:
Comma separated list of solution uniquenames to consider.
Wildcards (%) are allowed

options.description:
Print a table report to the console after the config file
has been created
